message:
Command `# Extract all port declarations from wrapper.v
python3 -c "
import re
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v') as f:
    content = f.read()
# Find module port declarations (between module ... ( and );)
# Extract inout/input/output port names
ports = re.findall(r'\b(?:inout|input|output)\s+(?:\[[\d:]+\]\s+)?(\w+)\s*[,)]', content)
print(f'Total wrapper ports: {len(ports)}')
print('Sample:', ports[:5])
with open('/tmp/wrapper_ports.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('\n'.join(ports))
"` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Extract all port declarations from wrapper.v
python3 -c "
import re
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v') as f:
    content = f.read()
# Find module port declarations (between module ... ( and );)
# Extract inout/input/output port names
ports = re.findall(r'\b(?:inout|input|output)\s+(?:\[[\d:]+\]\s+)?(\w+)\s*[,)]', content)
print(f'Total wrapper ports: {len(ports)}')
print('Sample:', ports[:5])
with open('/tmp/wrapper_ports.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('\n'.join(ports))
"
